title: Lonely (Legacy)
body:
# Lonely (Legacy) for 1.18.2 & 1.16.5 ## **NOTICE** This mod is no longer receiving updates!
Please download the [newer version](https://www.google.com/) instead. This mod just basically makes mobs unable to spawn.
## Important: This mod also only supported **Forge**!
I **Recommend** using this mod on **Singleplayer**! But you can also use it on your server! (The client side has to install this mod too!) When you enter the game, you must first send something in chat! ### Why? Because this mod has a bug that it despawns all entities in your render distance while you are generating the world, so the world can't be generated. That's why you need to confirm it in the world! ## Support me! ## Images:
